description_long: This is a tall, ornate vertical banner mounted on a dark, spiked pole with a decorative finial at the top. The banner itself is a deep red fabric, adorned with a bold white graphic resembling two stylized, mirrored animal heads or horns. The fabric is suspended from a horizontal bar by two short chains, giving it a slightly medieval or fantasy appearance. The pole features additional spiked elements at both the top and bottom, enhancing its imposing look. The overall design suggests it is intended for outdoor display, possibly as a marker or symbol for a group or faction.
description: A tall, spiked pole supports a red banner with a white, mirrored animal motif, suspended by chains for a dramatic, medieval look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full red banner with white mirrored animal design and the ornate spiked pole.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the pole and the chain suspension, with the banner barely visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the back of the banner and the symmetrical pole structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thinness of the pole and the chain attachment, with minimal banner visibility.
